name: WPP AI Operating Model Audit - SharePoint LIVE v1

parameters.jsCode:
const payload = $('Compose Audit Outputs').first().json;
const wb = $('Build Workbook Context').first().json;
const row = payload.auditMasterRow;
return [{
  json: {
    drive_id: wb.drive_id,
    workbook_item_id: wb.workbook_item_id,
    values: [[
      row.row_id,
      row.audit_id,
      row.client_name,
      row.sector,
      row.maturity_stage,
      row.run_timestamp,
      row.total_baseline_days,
      row.total_orchestrated_days,
      row.total_reduction_pct,
      row.total_opportunity_value,
      row.overall_status,
      row.notes,
      row.run_id,
      row.report_url,
      row.recommended_scenario,
      row.npv,
      row.irr,
      row.recommendations_count,
      row.raci_count,
      row.created_at
    ]]
  }
}];

const payload = $('Compose Audit Outputs').first().json;
const wb = $('Build Workbook Context').first().json;
const values = payload.kpiBenchmarking.map(r => ([
  r.row_id,
  r.audit_id,
  r.client_name,
  r.sector,
  r.metric,
  r.client_value,
  r.industry_avg,
  r.best_in_class,
  r.direction,
  r.unit,
  r.gap_vs_avg_pct,
  r.status,
  r.opportunity_value,
  r.created_at
]));
return [{ json: { drive_id: wb.drive_id, workbook_item_id: wb.workbook_item_id, values } }];
